summary: runtimeProfile is non-sensitive: it includes runner id, process id, pid-file path, heartbeat enabled/status/ttl, loop bounds, ack renewal interval, and force-kill grace, but excludes task-pull and heartbeat tokens.

The change is command-output observability only; it does not alter API endpoints, DTOs, default-off gates, claim/ack/finish payloads, heartbeat writeback, pid-file ownership, local command execution, or loop exit policy.
Startup failure summaries receive the same runtime profile after config construction, so pid-file install failures remain supervisor-readable.
Background daemon/process-manager integration is not claimed by S004 and remains an explicit operator/deployment risk.
